title: Implement Evidence Gate (Phase A: threshold=0.0 pass-through)
description: Add evidence gate between retrieval and LLM generation. Phase A uses threshold=0.0 (pass-through) to capture score distributions without blocking. Gate uses post-rerank Citation.score.
acceptance_criteria: EvidenceGateService class with should_abstain(citations, config) method
Gate uses citations[0].score (post-rerank) as score source
Two abstention modes: no_context (empty citations) vs evidence_gate_abstain (low score)
ChatService.answer() and stream_answer_sse() call gate after build_citations()
Trace enriched with evidence_gate_result (triggered, top1_score, threshold)
Phase A: threshold defaults to 0.0 (all pass, just capturing scores)
All user-facing abstention messages are Chinese (PM Template A)
MAIN_CONTRACT_MATRIX.md checked before adding mode field to chat/ask response
frontend/src/api/client.ts reviewed for response handling compatibility
implementation_steps: 0. MANDATORY READS: Read all files listed in agents_compliance.mandatory_reads BEFORE any code changes
1. Check MAIN_CONTRACT_MATRIX.md for POST /api/v1/chat/ask response contract constraints
3. Add evidence_gate config section to system_config schema
4. Integrate gate into ChatService.answer() after build_citations()
5. Add _build_evidence_gate_response() with Chinese Template A message
7. Set default threshold to 0.0 in system_config.json
9. Update frontend/src/api/types.ts with 'evidence_gate_abstain' in ChatResponse mode union
10. Review frontend/src/api/client.ts for response handling of new mode
12. /review: Review all changes before marking complete

agents_compliance.reason: Cross-module (services + schemas + frontend types). Adds 'evidence_gate_abstain' mode to stable contract POST /api/v1/chat/ask. Modifies chat service chain. NOT Lite Mode eligible per AGENTS.md §2 禁止条件: '需要改 schema、API、frontend API 类型或 client'.
contract_checks: POST /api/v1/chat/ask — response mode field gains 'evidence_gate_abstain' value
MAIN_CONTRACT_MATRIX.md — verify adding mode is not expanding stable contract
frontend/src/api/types.ts — ChatResponseMode type must include new mode
frontend/src/api/client.ts — response parsing must handle new mode
agents_compliance.retrieval_state_acknowledgment: Current state: Phase 1B-B, GATE NOT PASSED. Evidence gate does NOT modify retrieval internals — it sits in the chat layer AFTER retrieval and rerank, reading post-rerank Citation.score. This is explicitly within scope per RAG_FAST_LAUNCH_PLAN.md: '不动 retrieval 内部逻辑'.

brain_tasks: Define EvidenceGateService interface and integration boundary
Check MAIN_CONTRACT_MATRIX.md for mode field constraints
Decide if evidence_gate_abstain mode is additive (non-breaking) to stable contract
Design score source: confirm post-rerank Citation.score availability
Review final implementation and test coverage
executor_tasks: Add config schema for evidence_gate section
Update frontend types.ts with new mode
